name: 原子与分子
subject: science
curriculum_points: Students in MYP 2-4 will be able to describe the basic structure of an atom (protons, neutrons, electrons) and use the periodic table to identify elements by their atomic number and mass.
Students will be able to differentiate between atoms, elements, molecules, and compounds, and represent simple molecules using chemical formulas (e.g., H2O, CO2).
